description: HTTP server for Lisp-Stat: serves plots (Vega-Embed), data frames (CSV/JSON/sexp), Vega-Lite specs, DataTables views, and supports data frame editing — all using Accept header content negotiation.

userStories.title: Set up project test infrastructure
userStories.description: Create the ASDF system definition, clunit2 test package, root test suite, and verify the test harness loads and runs cleanly.
acceptanceCriteria: ASDF system 'ls-server' defined in ls-server.asd with source components and a :test-op perform method
Package ls-server declared in src/pkgdcl.lisp using uiop:define-package with explicit exports
Test package ls-server-tests declared in tests/test-package.lisp using uiop:define-package
Root suite all-tests defined in tests/main.lisp with a run-tests function that rebinds clunit:*test-output-stream*
asdf:test-system runs and reports 0 failures with no load errors
userStories.notes: ASDF system, source package, test package, root suite, harness-sanity test all created. 1 test passes.

userStories.title: Implement basic health-check route
userStories.description: Add a /health endpoint that returns HTTP 200 with JSON body {"status": "ok"}. Route handler is a plain function testable without a running server; integration test uses dexador against a running Hunchentoot instance.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /health returns HTTP 200
Response Content-Type is application/json
Response body is valid JSON containing a 'status' key with value 'ok'
A clunit2 integration test using dexador verifies the response
userStories.notes: Health route handler, server lifecycle (start/stop), 3 dexador integration tests, polling-based readiness check, unwind-protect teardown.

userStories.title: Server lifecycle management
userStories.description: Implement start-server and stop-server functions that manage a Hunchentoot acceptor. The server listens on a configurable port (default 20202) and is stored in a *server* special variable.
acceptanceCriteria: start-server starts a Hunchentoot easy-acceptor on the given port
stop-server stops the running acceptor and sets *server* to nil
Calling start-server when already running signals a condition or restarts cleanly
A clunit2 test verifies the server starts, accepts connections, and stops
userStories.notes: Server lifecycle already implemented in US-002. Added 3 dedicated lifecycle tests: start+connect, stop+nil-check, restart-when-running.

userStories.title: Accept header content negotiation
userStories.description: Implement a content negotiation utility that parses HTTP Accept headers (RFC 7231) with quality values and selects the best matching media type from a list of supported types.
acceptanceCriteria: parse-accept parses an Accept header string into a sorted list of (media-type . quality) pairs
negotiate-content-type selects the best match from supported types
Handles wildcard types (*/*, type/*)
Falls back to a configurable default when no match is found
Unit tests verify parsing, quality ordering, wildcard matching, and fallback
userStories.notes: parse-accept and negotiate-content-type with RFC 7231 quality values, wildcard matching, and configurable defaults. 8 unit tests.

userStories.title: Data frame listing endpoint
userStories.description: Implement GET /data that returns a JSON array of available data frame names. Searches LS-USER and CL-USER packages for bound symbols whose values are data-frames.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /data returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type application/json
Response body is a JSON array of data frame name strings
At least the Vega example data frames (e.g. mtcars) appear when loaded
Integration test with dexador verifies the response
userStories.notes: GET /data returns JSON array of data frame names from LS-USER and CL-USER. 3 integration tests.

userStories.title: Data frame retrieval with content negotiation
userStories.description: Implement GET /data/<name> that serves data frame contents. The format is determined by the Accept header: application/vega-json (Vega row-oriented JSON), application/json (generic JSON, default), text/csv (CSV), text/s-expression (sexp). Name lookup is case-insensitive, checks LS-USER then CL-USER. Returns 404 if not found.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /data/mtcars with Accept: application/json returns JSON with 200
GET /data/mtcars with Accept: application/vega-json returns Vega-format JSON with 200
GET /data/mtcars with Accept: text/csv returns CSV with 200
GET /data/mtcars with Accept: text/s-expression returns sexp with 200
GET /data/nonexistent returns 404
Name is case-insensitive (mtcars and MTCARS both work)
Integration tests with dexador verify each format and the 404 case
userStories.notes: GET /data/<name> with Accept header content negotiation: application/json, application/vega-json, text/csv, text/s-expression. 404 for missing. Case-insensitive. 6 integration tests.

userStories.title: Plot listing endpoint
userStories.description: Implement GET /plot that returns a JSON array of available plot names from vega:*all-plots*.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /plot returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type application/json
Response body is a JSON array of plot name strings
Integration test with dexador verifies the response
userStories.notes: GET /plot returns JSON array of plot names. 2 integration tests.

userStories.title: Plot Vega-Lite spec serving
userStories.description: Implement GET /plot/<name> with Accept: application/vega-json that returns the raw Vega-Lite JSON specification for the named plot. Returns 404 if the plot is not found.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /plot/<name> with Accept: application/vega-json returns Vega-Lite spec JSON with 200
Response Content-Type is application/vega-json
Response body is valid JSON containing $schema key
GET /plot/nonexistent returns 404
Integration test with dexador verifies the response
userStories.notes: GET /plot/<name> with Accept: application/vega-json returns Vega-Lite spec with $schema. 4 integration tests.

userStories.title: Plot HTML viewer with Vega-Embed
userStories.description: Implement GET /plot/<name> with Accept: text/html that returns a full HTML page embedding the plot using Vega-Embed. The Vega-Embed loader is configured to send Accept: application/vega-json when fetching data URLs. Static JS assets served from jsDelivr CDN.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /plot/<name> with Accept: text/html returns HTML page with 200
HTML contains Vega-Embed script tags from jsDelivr CDN
HTML contains vegaEmbed call with loader configured to send Accept: application/vega-json header
The plot spec references data via /data/<name> URL (not inline)
Integration test with dexador verifies HTML structure
userStories.notes: GET /plot/<name> with Accept: text/html returns Vega-Embed HTML page with jsDelivr CDN and custom loader headers. 4 integration tests.

userStories.title: DataTables HTML view
userStories.description: Implement GET /table/<name> that returns an HTML page using the DataTables JavaScript library to display data frame contents in an interactive table. Data is fetched from /data/<name> via AJAX.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /table/<name> returns HTML page with 200
HTML includes DataTables CSS and JS from CDN
HTML includes jQuery from CDN
DataTables AJAX source points to /data/<name>
GET /table/nonexistent returns 404
Integration test with dexador verifies HTML structure
userStories.notes: GET /table/<name> returns DataTables HTML page with jQuery + DataTables CDN, AJAX from /data/<name>. 7 integration tests.

userStories.title: Data frame editing
userStories.description: Implement PUT /data/<name> to replace an entire data frame from a JSON request body, and PATCH /data/<name> to update individual rows. Both accept Content-Type: application/json. Return the updated data frame as JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: PUT /data/<name> with JSON body replaces the data frame and returns 200
PATCH /data/<name> with JSON body updates specified rows and returns 200
PUT/PATCH to nonexistent data frame returns 404
Invalid JSON body returns 400
Integration tests with dexador verify PUT, PATCH, 404, and 400 cases
userStories.notes: PUT /data/<name> replaces frame from JSON array. PATCH /data/<name> updates cells with bounds checking. 5 integration tests.

userStories.title: Landing page
userStories.description: Implement GET / that returns an HTML landing page listing available data frames (with links to /data/<name> and /table/<name>) and available plots (with links to /plot/<name>).
acceptanceCriteria: GET / returns HTML page with 200
Page lists available data frames with links
Page lists available plots with links
Integration test with dexador verifies HTML contains expected links

userStories.title: Default content type to CSV for data retrieval
userStories.description: When GET /data/<name> is requested without an Accept header, the response should default to text/csv instead of application/json.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /data/<name> without Accept header returns text/csv
GET /data/<name> with explicit Accept headers still works for all types
GET /data (listing) still returns application/json regardless
Integration test verifies no-Accept-header returns CSV
userStories.notes: Reordered *data-supported-types* to put text/csv first. Added :default text/csv to negotiate-content-type call. 1 new integration test.

userStories.title: Comprehensive content negotiation test coverage
userStories.description: Add thorough integration tests for content negotiation on /data/<name>, verifying response Content-Type headers for all supported types including text/s-expression, and the new CSV default.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests verify Content-Type header for each: application/json, application/vega-json, text/csv, text/s-expression
Test verifies no-Accept-header defaults to text/csv
Test verifies wildcard Accept (*/*) returns text/csv default
All existing negotiation unit tests still pass
userStories.notes: 6 new integration tests verifying Content-Type headers for all data formats plus wildcard and absent Accept header defaults.

userStories.title: Fix floating-point display in JSON encoding
userStories.description: Single-float values in data frames (e.g. mtcars mpg 15.2) are encoded by Yason with full IEEE 754 precision (15.199999809265137). Fix the JSON encoding layer to coerce single-floats to double-floats before encoding, without modifying the underlying data frames.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /data/mtcars with Accept: application/json returns 15.2 not 15.199999809265137 for AMC Javelin mpg
Fix is in the encoding layer, not the data frames themselves
Integration test verifies a known float value is encoded correctly
All existing data tests still pass
userStories.notes: Added yason:encode method for single-float using *read-default-float-format* to avoid IEEE 754 coercion artifacts. 1 integration test with 4 assertions.

userStories.title: Display data-frame documentation on table pages
userStories.description: Table pages should display the data-frame documentation (from (documentation sym 'variable)) in a non-intrusive way such as a collapsible details/summary element or popup, so lengthy documentation does not obscure the table.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /table/mtcars HTML contains the mtcars documentation string
Documentation is in a collapsible or popup element
GET /table/<name> for frames without documentation still works
Integration test verifies documentation presence for mtcars
userStories.notes: data-table-page accepts &key documentation. Renders in <details>/<summary> element. handle-table-get passes (documentation sym 'variable). 1 new test.

userStories.title: Fix test plot to produce actual output
userStories.description: The test plot created with vega:make-plot has no data or spec, so Vega-Embed renders nothing. Create a proper test plot with data and a spec so the HTML page actually renders a visualization.
acceptanceCriteria: Test plot has a Vega-Lite spec with data, mark, and encoding
GET /plot/test-plot with Accept: text/html renders a visible plot
GET /plot/test-plot with Accept: application/vega-json returns a spec with data
Existing plot tests still pass
userStories.notes: Test plot now uses vega::%defplot with complete bar chart spec. 1 new test verifying spec has data.

userStories.title: Improve plot testing strategy
userStories.description: Replace schema-checking tests with end-to-end tests: fetch HTML page, extract the embedded Vega-Lite spec, verify it contains the correct $schema URL, extract the data URL from the spec, fetch it via dexador, and verify the returned data is correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Test fetches plot HTML and extracts embedded Vega-Lite spec JSON
Test verifies $schema URL is correct Vega-Lite v6 URL
Test extracts data URL from spec and fetches it via dexador
Test verifies fetched data contains expected content
All tests use dexador for network calls
userStories.notes: Added 3 end-to-end tests: spec schema check, inline data verification, URL data fetch. Uses extract-spec-from-html regex helper.

userStories.title: Redesign landing page with sidebar and separate pages
userStories.description: Redesign the landing page with a modern layout inspired by ElectronDisplay.jl. Create separate /plots and /tables index pages with sidebar navigation and plot thumbnails.
acceptanceCriteria: GET / redirects or links to /plots and /tables pages
GET /plots returns HTML with sidebar listing plots with thumbnails
GET /tables returns HTML with sidebar listing data frames
Pages have modern CSS styling (flexbox/grid layout)
Integration tests verify both pages render correctly
userStories.notes: Landing page shows hub cards linking to /plots and /tables. Both index pages have sidebar + card grid layout with shared CSS.

userStories.title: Replace DataTables with Handsontable and add PUT test fixtures
userStories.description: Replace the DataTables JavaScript library with Handsontable for interactive table display and editing. Add before/after PUT test fixtures that create a known data frame, PUT a known JSON payload, and verify the result.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /table/<name> HTML uses Handsontable instead of DataTables
Handsontable JS and CSS loaded from CDN
PUT test creates a data frame, PUTs new data, verifies each column matches expected values
PATCH test verifies individual cell updates with before/after comparison
Editing via Handsontable can save back to the data frame via PUT
userStories.notes: Replaced DataTables+jQuery with standalone Handsontable. Added before/after PUT fixture test with row count and content verification.

userStories.title: Create project README
userStories.description: Create a README.md using examples/README.md as template. Include project description, prerequisites, installation, starting the server, configuration, API endpoints, code structure, testing instructions, and contributing guidelines.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md exists in project root
Includes server start/stop instructions
Documents all API endpoints
Describes code structure and key files
Includes test running instructions
userStories.notes: Full README with API endpoint tables, code structure tree, installation, usage, and testing sections.

userStories.title: Table editor Save/Cancel with batch mode
userStories.description: Replace real-time cell-by-cell PATCH with explicit Save and Cancel buttons. Save sends a PUT with the full data frame. Cancel reverts to the last-loaded state.
acceptanceCriteria: Table page HTML contains a Save button
Table page HTML contains a Cancel button
Save button sends PUT /data/<name> with full JSON payload
Cancel button reverts table data to last-loaded state
No afterChange PATCH handler in the generated JavaScript
All existing PUT/PATCH API tests still pass
userStories.notes: Replaced afterChange PATCH with batch Save/Cancel buttons. Save sends PUT, Cancel reverts to original. 3 new tests.

userStories.title: Example scatterplot loaded with ls-server
userStories.description: Ship an example scatterplot that loads with ls-server. Provide *load-examples* parameter so users can suppress it.
acceptanceCriteria: Example scatterplot appears in vega:*all-plots* when ls-server is loaded
GET /plot/<example-name> returns 200 with valid HTML
*load-examples* parameter defaults to t
Setting *load-examples* to nil before loading suppresses the example
userStories.notes: Example mtcars scatterplot (mpg vs hp, colored by cyl). Loaded via create-example-plots, guarded by *load-examples*. 2 new tests.

userStories.title: Redesign /plots with thumbnail sidebar (SPA)
userStories.description: Redesign the /plots page with a left sidebar showing actual rendered Vega-Lite thumbnails. Clicking a thumbnail loads the full plot inline without navigation. Layout inspired by ElectronDisplay.jl.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /plots returns HTML with vega-embed CDN scripts
HTML contains thumbnail container elements for each plot
HTML contains a main-plot div for full-size rendering
JavaScript fetches specs and renders thumbnails via vegaEmbed
Clicking a thumbnail renders the full plot in the main panel
Selected thumbnail has a visual highlight border
First plot is auto-selected on load
userStories.notes: SPA plots page with vegaEmbed thumbnails in sidebar, selectPlot for inline rendering, auto-select first plot. 4 new tests.

userStories.title: Right-click context menu to delete plots
userStories.description: Add a right-click context menu on plot thumbnails with a Delete option. DELETE /plot/<name> removes from vega:*all-plots*. Includes confirmation dialog.
acceptanceCriteria: Right-clicking a thumbnail shows a custom context menu
Delete option sends DELETE /plot/<name> to server
DELETE /plot/<name> returns 200 and removes plot from *all-plots*
DELETE /plot/nonexistent returns 404
After deletion thumbnail is removed from sidebar
Confirmation dialog appears before deletion
userStories.notes: DELETE /plot/<name> handler, context menu with right-click on thumbnails, confirm() dialog, sidebar removal on delete. 4 new tests.

userStories.title: Add URL to print-object for data-frame and plot
userStories.description: When ls-server is loaded and server is running, print-object for data-frame and vega-plot appends the HTTP URL via :after methods. Default host is localhost with *server-host* for override.
acceptanceCriteria: print-object for data-frame includes /table/<name> URL when server running
print-object for vega-plot includes /plot/<name> URL when server running
No URL printed when *server* is nil
*server-host* defaults to localhost
URL uses the actual server port
userStories.notes: print-object :after methods for data-frame and vega-plot append server URL when running. *server-host* defaults to localhost. 4 unit tests.

userStories.title: Configuration file and hunchentoot logging
userStories.description: Create src/config.lisp consolidating all options. Add hunchentoot log redirection with on/off flag.
acceptanceCriteria: All config params (*default-port*, *server-host*, *access-log-destination*, *message-log-destination*) are in config.lisp
Hunchentoot log destinations are configurable via *access-log-destination* and *message-log-destination*
Existing tests pass
userStories.notes: Created config.lisp with all config params. Hunchentoot log destinations configurable via *access-log-destination* and *message-log-destination*.

userStories.title: Remove sample plots
userStories.description: Delete src/examples.lisp and all references. User arranges their own example plot via init file.
acceptanceCriteria: examples.lisp is deleted
*load-examples* and create-example-plots exports removed
Related tests removed
All remaining tests pass
userStories.notes: Deleted examples.lisp, removed ASDF component, removed exports and tests.

userStories.title: Fix plot thumbnails
userStories.description: Thumbnails display correctly with consistent sizing following ElectronDisplay.jl approach: render to PNG via vega.View.toImageURL(), display as img tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Thumbnail JS uses vega.View.toImageURL for PNG rendering
CSS provides consistent thumbnail sizing
Existing tests pass

userStories.title: Fix print-object URL placement
userStories.description: URL appears inside #<...> output, not after the closing >. Change :after to :around methods.
acceptanceCriteria: print-object for data-frame shows URL inside #<...>
print-object for vega-plot shows URL inside #<...>
Docstring is preserved in output
Tests verify URL placement
userStories.notes: Changed :after to :around methods. URL now inside #<...>. Added inject-url-into-output helper.

userStories.title: Fix vgcars table display
userStories.description: vgcars data frame displays correctly in Handsontable. Root cause: :NA symbol values fail yason encoding.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /data/VGCARS returns valid JSON with null for NA values
data-table-page JS has error handling
Tests verify NA-containing data frames encode correctly
userStories.notes: Bound yason:*symbol-encoder* for :NA values. Added fetch error handling and NA test.

userStories.title: Fix tables sidebar alignment
userStories.description: Tables sidebar shows only data-frame name as clickable link. Remove table|data text pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar shows only data-frame name linking to /table/<name>
No table|data links in sidebar
Tests updated
userStories.notes: Simplified sidebar to show only data-frame name as clickable /table/ link.

userStories.title: Update README with new functionality
userStories.description: Update README.md to reflect SPA plots, batch editing, print-object URLs, DELETE endpoint, config options.
acceptanceCriteria: README documents print-object URL examples
README documents DELETE endpoint
README documents configuration options
README documents batch table editing

userStories.title: Fix VGCARS data endpoint encoding error
userStories.description: Fix yason symbol encoding error when serving VGCARS data as JSON. Bind both *symbol-encoder* and *symbol-key-encoder* in all data encoding paths.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /data/VGCARS returns valid JSON without error
NA values in data frame are encoded as JSON null
All data encoding paths handle symbol values
userStories.notes: Reuse encode-symbol-for-vega in all JSON paths. Added vega-json NA test.

userStories.title: Fix blank hp-mpg plot via table content negotiation
userStories.description: Add content negotiation to /table/ endpoint so VegaEmbed can fetch JSON data from table URLs.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /table/<name> with Accept: application/vega-json returns JSON data
GET /table/<name> with Accept: text/html returns HTML page
Plots referencing /table/<name> data URLs render correctly

userStories.title: Restore VegaEmbed actions menu
userStories.description: Remove actions: false from plots SPA vegaEmbed call to restore the three-dot export/debug menu.
acceptanceCriteria: VegaEmbed actions menu appears in plots SPA main viewer
Generated HTML does not contain actions: false for main plot

userStories.title: Add resizable sidebar to plots SPA
userStories.description: Add drag-to-resize handle between sidebar and main panel in the plots SPA page.
acceptanceCriteria: Resize handle element present between sidebar and main panel
CSS includes resize-handle styling with col-resize cursor
JavaScript handles mousedown/mousemove for drag-to-resize

userStories.title: Fix VegaEmbed actions menu CSS interference
userStories.description: VegaEmbed three-dot actions menu is clipped by .main-panel overflow: auto CSS in the plots SPA page. Add CSS overrides to prevent clipping.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS includes overflow: visible for .vega-embed in main panel
CSS includes z-index for .vega-actions in main panel
Individual plot page has no conflicting overflow CSS
userStories.notes: Root cause: .main-panel overflow: auto clips VegaEmbed's absolutely-positioned .vega-actions dropdown. Fix: overflow: visible on .vega-embed wrapper, z-index: 100 on .vega-actions.

userStories.title: Make VegaEmbed three-dot icon always visible
userStories.description: VegaEmbed v6 sets the three-dot summary icon to opacity 0.2 by default — nearly invisible on white backgrounds. Override to 0.7 so users can discover the actions menu.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS includes .vega-embed summary { opacity: 0.7 !important; }
Override present in both SPA CSS and individual plot page
Hover still transitions to opacity 1.0
userStories.notes: REVERTED by US-045. The real issue was container sizing (#main-plot width/height 100%) pushing the icon to the page corner, not low opacity.

userStories.title: Add lambda favicon to all pages
userStories.description: Add a lambda (λ) SVG favicon to all 5 HTML pages using an inline URL-encoded SVG data URI. No external file needed.
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 pages (landing, plots, tables, data-table, vega-embed) include <link rel='icon'> tag
Favicon displays lambda (λ) symbol
SVG data URI is URL-encoded to avoid CL-WHO single-quote conflicts
userStories.notes: CL-WHO uses single quotes for HTML attributes. Nested single quotes in SVG data URI break parsing — must URL-encode entire SVG including λ → %CE%BB.

userStories.title: Fix VegaEmbed container sizing
userStories.description: Remove forced width/height from #main-plot so VegaEmbed sizes naturally to the plot. Reverts US-043 opacity override — the real issue was container sizing pushing the actions icon to the page corner.
acceptanceCriteria: #main-plot CSS does not force width or height
VegaEmbed sizes to natural plot dimensions
Opacity override removed from both SPA and individual page
Individual plot page has explicit white background
userStories.notes: Root cause: #main-plot had width: 100%; height: 100% making VegaEmbed fill the entire main panel. Actions icon (positioned top-right of container) ended up in page corner far from plot. Fix: remove forced sizing so container matches plot size.
